sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Check columns 23 and 35 to see if they match
col23_colors = []
col35_colors = []
for i, n in enumerate(nodes):
    if n['pixels'] <= 40 and n['color'] not in ['G', 'c', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        cr = (min(rows)+max(rows))//2
        cc = (min(cols)+max(cols))//2
        if cc == 23:
            col23_colors.append((cr, n['color']))
        if cc == 35:
            col35_colors.append((cr, n['color']))
col23_colors.sort()
col35_colors.sort()
print("Col 23 colors:", [(cr, c) for cr, c in col23_colors])
print("Col 35 colors:", [(cr, c) for cr, c in col35_colors])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Check columns 23 and 35 to see if they match
col23_colors = []
col35_colors = []
for i, n in enumerate(nodes):
    if n['pixels'] <= 40 and n['color'] not in ['G', 'c', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        cr = (min(rows)+max(rows))//2
        cc = (min(cols)+max(cols))//2
        if cc == 23:
            col23_colors.append((cr, n['color']))
        if cc == 35:
            col35_colors.append((cr, n['color']))
col23_colors.sort()
col35_colors.sort()
print("Col 23 colors:", [(cr, c) for cr, c in col23_colors])
print("Col 35 colors:", [(cr, c) for cr, c in col35_colors])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
